title: Navigate between key pages using the navbar
description: Users can use the navbar to reach Chat, Shorts, About, and Profile pages without losing navigation state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Use the navbar to go to the chat page
Use the navbar to go to the shorts page
Use the navbar to go to the about page
Use the navbar to open the profile page
Verify the user lands on the profile page

title: Browse shorts by selecting a chat session
description: Users can select a chat session from the shorts sidebar and the corresponding vertical feed loads and displays a short.

steps.description: Navigate to /shorts
Wait for the chat sessions list in the sidebar to load
Click a chat session in the sidebar
Verify the vertical feed displays shorts for the selected chat

title: Start generation journey from the home page CTA
description: Verifies a guest can move from the marketing home page into the chat generation page via the primary CTA and land on the chat experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary call-to-action to start generating a video
Verify the user lands on the chat generation page
Verify the chat generation inputs are available

title: Directly open Shorts unauthenticated and browse General library
description: Verifies an unauthenticated visitor can open Shorts directly and browse the General library feed.

steps.description: Navigate to /shorts
Select a chat from the sidebar
Scroll the vertical feed to the next short
Verify the shorts sidebar indicates the General library is active
Verify the feed updates to show a different short

title: Navigate between shorts in the vertical feed
description: Users can move through multiple shorts in a chat using scroll or swipe and the feed advances one short at a time.

steps.description: Navigate to /shorts
Wait for the chat sessions list in the sidebar to load
Click a chat session that has multiple shorts
Scroll to move to the next short in the feed
Verify a different short is displayed in the feed

title: Control playback and audio while watching shorts
description: Users can toggle play/pause and mute/unmute on a short and the controls reflect the updated state.

steps.description: Navigate to /shorts
Wait for the chat sessions list in the sidebar to load
Click a chat session in the sidebar
Click the video to toggle play/pause
Click the mute control to toggle audio
Verify playback and mute controls reflect the toggled states

title: Navigate to core pages using the navbar from the home page
description: Verifies the main navigation from the home page can reach core routes and the app remains navigable across pages.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to the chat page
Click the navigation link to the shorts page
Click the navigation link to the about page
Click the navigation link to the profile page
Verify the user lands on the profile page
Verify the page renders without a broken or blank state

title: Navbar reflects guest auth state on home and profile
description: Unauthenticated users see guest login affordances in the navbar and the profile page shows an upsell instead of account info.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify login affordances are visible in the navbar
Use the navbar to open the profile page
Verify the profile page shows a guest upsell and a way to navigate to login

title: Open a short in a new tab from the feed
description: Users can choose to open the current short in a new tab and the new tab shows a standalone video view.

steps.description: Navigate to /shorts
Wait for the chat sessions list in the sidebar to load
Click a chat session in the sidebar
Choose to open the current short in a new tab
Verify a new tab opens with a standalone short view

title: Generate shorts from a URL and see batch status stream
description: Verifies a user can submit a URL with a valid video count and see live generation status appear in the chat conversation.

steps.description: Navigate to /chat
Fill a valid URL into the prompt input
Set the desired video count to a valid value within the allowed range
Submit the prompt to start generation
Verify a live generation status stream appears in the conversation
Verify the conversation shows an in-progress generation state

title: Browse General library from login as guest
description: Verifies a visitor can continue as guest from the login page and browse the shared General library on Shorts.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Choose to continue as guest
Click to navigate to the shorts library
Verify the shorts sidebar indicates the General library is active
Verify a vertical shorts feed is displayed

title: Access login from the home page
description: Verifies a guest can reach the login page from the home page and see authentication entry options.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to the login page
Verify the user lands on the login page
Verify guest entry and Google sign-in options are visible

title: View short metadata in the info panel
description: Users can open a metadata panel for a short and see details like title, source, duration, and style.

steps.description: Navigate to /shorts
Wait for the chat sessions list in the sidebar to load
Click a chat session in the sidebar
Open the metadata panel for the currently displayed short
Verify the metadata panel shows details for the short

title: Log out returns the app to guest state
description: Verifies an authenticated user can log out from the profile page and the UI returns to guest state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with test-auth-20260413@example.com
Fill in the password field with DraftrTest!2026
Submit the login form
Click to navigate to the profile page
Choose to log out
Verify the profile page shows a guest upsell experience
Verify a login navigation option is visible

title: Authenticated profile shows identity, stats, recent chats, and opens library
description: Authenticated users see their profile identity and stats, can view recent chats, and can navigate to their shorts library from profile.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with test-auth-20260413@example.com
Fill in the password field with DraftrTest!2026
Submit the login form
Navigate to /profile
Click the control to open your library
Verify the shorts library page is displayed

title: Discover product explanation from home page to about page
description: Verifies a guest can navigate from the home page to the about page using the educational CTA and view the product explanation content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the section that explains how the product works
Click the call-to-action to learn how it works
Verify the user lands on the about page
Verify the about page explainer content is displayed

title: Like a short and see liked state update
description: Users can like a short and the UI updates to show the short is liked.

steps.description: Navigate to /shorts
Wait for the chat sessions list in the sidebar to load
Click a chat session in the sidebar
Click the like control on the currently displayed short
Verify the short displays a liked state

title: Unauthenticated profile shows guest upsell and login option
description: Verifies that when no session exists, the profile page shows an upsell experience with a path to login.

steps.description: Navigate to /profile
Verify the profile page shows a guest upsell experience
Verify a login navigation option is visible

title: Guest profile shows upsell and routes to login
description: Guest users can open the login page from the profile upsell prompt.

steps.description: Navigate to /profile
Click the login navigation from the guest upsell
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: After logout, navigating to profile remains in guest view
description: Verifies that after logging out, revisiting the profile page still shows the guest upsell state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with test-auth-20260413@example.com
Fill in the password field with DraftrTest!2026
Submit the login form
Click to navigate to the profile page
Choose to log out
Navigate to /profile
Verify the profile page shows a guest upsell experience
Verify a login navigation option is visible

title: Home page value proposition sections are visible
description: Verifies the home page presents the product value sections so a guest can understand what the app does.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll through the marketing sections on the page
Verify the product description content is displayed
Verify feature highlights are displayed

title: Empty prompt submit is prevented
description: Verifies the user cannot start generation when the prompt input is empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /chat
Ensure the prompt input is empty
Attempt to submit the prompt
Verify generation does not start
Verify the conversation does not show an in-progress generation state

title: Video count stepper enforces lower bound
description: Verifies the video count cannot be decreased below the minimum allowed value.

steps.description: Navigate to /chat
Decrease the video count repeatedly until it stops changing
Verify the displayed video count is not below the allowed minimum

title: Video count stepper enforces upper bound
description: Verifies the video count cannot be increased above the maximum allowed value.

steps.description: Navigate to /chat
Increase the video count repeatedly until it stops changing
Verify the displayed video count is not above the allowed maximum
